commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor-owned runtime proof and maintainer/security review of the approval parsing trust boundary before merge; this is not a safe automated repair marker while proof is insufficient.; Needs attention: The PR narrows accidental spoofing but still lets raw command output masquerade as an approval wrapper when it includes an accepted source prefix.; Review finding: [P2] Gate approval-wrapper parsing to trust... commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces exec-approval regex parsing with balanced metadata parsing, changes approval-denial reason formatting/sanitization, and adds parser/followup tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main emits `approval-timeout (allowlist-miss)` and the current `[^)]*` parser cannot match that nested metadata as a denied result. I did not run a live gateway flow because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-owned runtime proof and maintainer/security review of the approval parsing trust boundary before merge; this is not a safe automated repair marker while proof is insufficient.

target.title: fix(exec): parse nested approval metadata in async followups
target.author: amittell
